text: It makes sense to feel nervous right now, and I hope you know that what you are feeling is completely natural. Tomorrow will come and go, and you will get through it the way you have gotten through hard things before. The people who will be with you in that room have done this many times, and their whole focus will be on taking care of you. Try to rest tonight if you can. I will be thinking of you, and I will be right here when it is over.
